name: Failed Code Integrity Checks
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: Failed Code Integrity Checks
SIGMA Description: Detects code integrity failures such as missing page hashes or corrupted drivers due unauthorized modification. This could be a sign of tampered binaries.


False positives:
- Disk device errors

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('5038', '6281') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Failed Code Integrity Checks on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('5038', '6281') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Failed Code Integrity Checks
